title: U&C Planet Large Quoits,10 Pcs Ropes &10 Pcs Plastic Rings with Carry Bag, Wooden Ring Toss Game for Kids and Adults
features: Wooden Ring Toss Game: U&C Planet Quotis is a tradition game that everyone loves! This complete set includes 4 sturdy words base plates, 20 Rings(10 ropes and 10 Plastic rings ) with a carry bag!
U&C Quoits Game: is made of high quality wood,which is sturdy and smooth.Chidren will enjoy the game and have fun!
Outdoor & Indoor : The Throwing Toss Game is suitable both for outdoor and indoor The storage bag is convinient for making this set perfect for parties and Camping
Easy Set up: the ring toss game includes simple rules to follow to encourage every family member to join in! Just have a good time with your children.
Perfect Gift：Great gift choice for kids at all occasions like christmas, birthday, halloween, Children's day and other holidays.
description: Product Description Previous page We have increased the Rings &Ropes to provide a better playing experience for our customers Easy to assemble and can be done in a minute!
